positive: Minimalist, high-contrast silhouette artwork of a cosmic whale breaching through a field of bioluminescent flowers and nebula clouds. The whale is depicted in profile, making it a strong central subject. The sky transitions from deep midnight indigo to electric cyan, contrasting sharply with the soft glow of the nebula. Scattered crystalline geometric elements (like constellations or fragmented stained glass patterns) surround the whale and flowers, adding depth and interest. Studio quality vector graphic style, suitable for screen printing, clean lines, extreme detail in the luminosity, centered composition, dramatic spotlighting on the subject, flat graphic design aesthetic, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, low quality, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, disfigured, grainy, photographic, hyperrealistic
